creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
$ sudo truss sg_luns /dev/da0
...
openat(AT_FDCWD,"/dev/xpt0",O_RDWR,00)           = 3 (0x3)
ioctl(3,CAMGETPASSTHRU,0xffffe480)               = 0 (0x0)
close(3)                                         = 0 (0x0)
openat(AT_FDCWD,"/dev/pass2",O_RDWR,00)          = 3 (0x3)
ioctl(3,CAMGETPASSTHRU,0xffffdd50)               = 0 (0x0)
ioctl(3,CAMIOCOMMAND,0xffffdd50)                 = 0 (0x0)
ioctl(3,CAMIOCOMMAND,0xffffdd50)                 = 0 (0x0)
ioctl(3,CAMIOCOMMAND,0xffffdd50)                 = 0 (0x0)
ioctl(3,CAMIOCOMMAND,0x1636000)                  = 0 (0x0)
Report Luns command not supported (support mandatory in SPC-3)
write(2,"Report Luns command not supporte"...,63) = 63 (0x3f)
close(3)                                         = 0 (0x0)
...

So I'm guessing it's one of those ioctls triggering the bad CSIO CCB.
